word: H6140 - עָקַשׁ - ʻâqash - aw-kash' - Make crooked

sections.paragraph:
Original: עקשׁ

Transliteration: ‛âqash

Phonetic: aw-kash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be perverse, twist, pervert, make crooked, prove perverse, declare perverse
    1. (Niphal) to be crooked
    2. (Piel) to twist, distort, pervert, make crooked
    3. (Hiphil) to declare crooked
    4. (Qal) perverse

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1684

Part(s) of speech: Verb
